licenseDefinitions.LicenseRef-Pexels: The Pexels content license, including its permitted uses and restrictions, applies to the identified Pexels photos.
licenseDefinitions.LicenseRef-Portfolio-Content-All-Rights-: Portfolio content is repository-owner controlled and is not granted under an open-source license.
licenseDefinitions.LicenseRef-Unsplash: The Unsplash License, including its permitted uses and restrictions, applies to the identified Unsplash visuals.

LicenseRef-Pexels.summary: Pexels permits free use and modification without required attribution, including website use. Its restrictions include unaltered resale, stock-platform redistribution, endorsement implications, certain harmful depictions, and trademark use.

LicenseRef-Unsplash.summary: Unsplash permits free commercial and non-commercial download, copying, modification, distribution, performance, and use without required attribution. It prohibits unmodified resale and compiling visuals to replicate a similar or competing service.

assets.origin: original geometric Y portfolio identity mark created for Yi Jiaxuan
